property_scores.justification: Precise value ('Professional Services') with direct homepage evidence and clear rationale excluding other sector types.
Highly specific niche (International Development Consulting — Public Sector Reform in LMICs) backed by service-line descriptions and case study geographies.
Clear end-service-provider position confirmed by site quote and delivery model; no intermediaries.
Mature classification well-supported but medium confidence given US aid headwinds and growth projections cited in evidence.
Project-based consulting fees clearly established; no pricing page, no SaaS, no subscription model visible.
Human-delivered embedded consulting confirmed explicitly from site positioning and tagline.
Variable-cost-heavy people-driven structure confirmed by 265-person global field delivery team.
Brand/trust moat and switching costs identified with reasonable evidence; moat depth is inferred from sector norms rather than directly measured.
Talent-market and aid-funding dependencies well-reasoned but specific funder mix (FCDO vs USAID) not confirmed.
230–265 estimate corroborated by multiple aggregators and CEO transition article; no primary disclosure available.
~$35M from LeadIQ/Tracxn is directionally consistent with headcount/billing-rate logic but no audited financials exist.
Bootstrapped/private partnership inferred from Swiss holding structure and no Crunchbase funding rounds; medium confidence.
Asset-light confirmed — services business, no manufacturing, fleet, or data centres identified.
Appears healthy based on headcount growth signals but profitability unknown; low-medium confidence without financials.
Founded 2013 confirmed precisely, placing company in established band (8–20 years) as of 2026.
Micro-to-small customer count inferred from government contract model and case studies; no count disclosed.
Scaling phase supported by 22% headcount growth, CEO transition mandate, and active job postings in 10+ countries; medium-high confidence.
Government/public sector and multilateral organisations clearly evidenced from case studies and service line descriptions.
Niche specialist stance well-supported by positioning against Palladium/DAI; medium confidence from indirect competitive intelligence.
Relationship/reputation-led motion inferred from thought leadership and conference presence; no internal sales data available.
Moderately concentrated inferred from 10+ concurrent country programs but no revenue breakdown published.
Premium/mid-market inferred from revenue-per-employee and sector billing-rate norms; no disclosed day rates.
Founder-to-professional-CEO transition precisely documented with named individuals, timeline, and mandate described.
Hub-and-spoke inference is reasonable from service lines and Swiss HQ but exact org topology not publicly documented.
Globally distributed/field-deployed confirmed precisely — 6 continents, 80% local-talent policy stated.
Domain-expert-heavy profile confirmed from leadership backgrounds, careers copy, and podcast guest profiles.
Tech-enabled consulting with genuine engineering function confirmed from Budapest hub, job postings, and RocketReach data; medium-high confidence.
Client-delivery-focused engineering described with reasonable detail; no CI/CD or practice-level evidence available.
Structured ETL/BI on AWS/GCP confirmed from multiple tech-stack sources; internal data practices not directly observed.
Basic posture inferred from absence of certifications and professional-services profile; largely assumed with low-medium confidence.
Moderate burden (Swiss law + international aid procurement) well-reasoned with clear structural evidence.
Global/multi-continent confirmed precisely — 6 continents, 10+ active country operations verified from job postings.
Aid-budget-dependent sensitivity well-reasoned; specific funder mix unconfirmed keeps this at medium confidence.
Private partnership with founder-retained chair confirmed from Swiss corporate structure; no external board obligations found.
Pragmatic/evidence-driven posture confirmed from WHO summit quote and site tagline; medium-high confidence.
Thought-leader/mission-driven challenger positioning precisely documented with specific content and conference appearances.
Mission-driven with values structurally embedded in talent policy (80% local staff) and careers framing.
Strong-in-niche with Glassdoor data (3.4/5, 69 reviews) giving a clear nuanced picture; medium-high confidence.
